'''hachuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanthropy|cyanthropy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanthropy|cyanthropy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hachuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæchithith|hæchithith]] || [[word:hæchithij|hæchithij]] || [[word:hæchithish|hæchithish]] || [[word:hæchithi|hæchithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hachuchuthuth|hachuchuthuth]] || [[word:hachuchuthuj|hachuchuthuj]] || [[word:hachuchuthush|hachuchuthush]] || [[word:hachuchuthu|hachuchuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hachuthuth|hachuthuth]] || [[word:hachuthuj|hachuthuj]] || [[word:hachuthush|hachuthush]] || [[word:hachuthu|hachuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hachufthufth|hachufthufth]] || [[word:hachufthufj|hachufthufj]] || [[word:hachufthufsh|hachufthufsh]] || [[word:hachufthuf|hachufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hachuthuthu|hachuthuthu]] || [[word:hachuthuju|hachuthuju]] || [[word:hachuthushu|hachuthushu]] || [[word:hachuthuku|hachuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hachuthuth|hachuthuth]] || [[word:hachuthuj|hachuthuj]] || [[word:hachuthush|hachuthush]] || [[word:hachuthu|hachuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hachuthuthul|hachuthuthul]] || [[word:hachuthujul|hachuthujul]] || [[word:hachuthushul|hachuthushul]] || [[word:hachuthukul|hachuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hachuthuuthuthu|hachuthuuthuthu]] || [[word:hachuthuujuju|hachuthuujuju]] || [[word:hachuthuushushu|hachuthuushushu]] || [[word:hachuthuuku|hachuthuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hachuthuthun|hachuthuthun]] || [[word:hachuthujun|hachuthujun]] || [[word:hachuthushun|hachuthushun]] || [[word:hachuthukun|hachuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hachuthuthuoro|hachuthuthuoro]] || [[word:hachuthujuoro|hachuthujuoro]] || [[word:hachuthushuoro|hachuthushuoro]] || [[word:hachuthukuoro|hachuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
